title: Cadbury Nigeria Propose 49 Kobo Dividend For 2019 Full Year
description: Cadbury Nigeria Plc on Monday March 30, 2020, said it will be paying a final dividend of 49k. This based on its financial report of December 31, 2019 to its shareholders whose names appear in the regi
html:
Cadbury Nigeria Plc on Monday March 30, 2020, said it will be paying a final dividend of 49k.

This based on its financial report of December 31, 2019 to its shareholders whose names appear in the register of Members as at the close of business on 22nd May 2020.

The date of payment of the dividend will be communicated at a later time as well as the date for the AGM.

This was disclosed in a document sent to the NSE portal today, Mar 30 and duly signed by the Company Secretary of the company, Mrs Fola Akande
